About this item

  • Reusable Plastic Wrap Alternative: Replace disposable plastic wrap cover with our reusable plastic bowl covers. These plastic food covers stretch reusable and plastic covers for bowls keep food fresh and reduce waste, essential for conscious kitchens
  • Multi-Purpose Use: Our elastic bowl covers reusable are perfect for bread proofing cover, sourdough bowl cover, and food covers for plates. These plastic covers for bowls with elastic and dish covers for food are must-have kitchen gadgets.
  • Outdoor Essential: Use our plastic food covers with elastic for picnics and outdoor meals. These dish covers for food, plastic food wrap, and disposable food cover plastic wrap keep bugs away, ensuring cleanliness for any outdoor dining setup.
  • Easy Cleanup: Simplify your cleanup with our reusable lids for bowls. These plastic lids for bowls, elastic food storage covers, and reusable saran wrap are great for covering leftovers, making storage easy, and maintaining freshness.
  • Ideal for Baking: Our bread bowl cover, bread proofing cover, and dough cover are perfect for bakers. These reusable fresh-keeping bags, stretchy bowl covers reusable, and plastic elastic bowl covers maintain dough consistency, essential for baking.

How customer reviews and ratings work

Customer Reviews, including Product Star Ratings help customers to learn more about the product and decide whether it is the right product for them.

To calculate the overall star rating and percentage breakdown by star, we don’t use a simple average. Instead, our system considers things like how recent a review is and if the reviewer bought the item on Amazon. It also analyzed reviews to verify trustworthiness.

Learn more how customers reviews work on Amazon

Customers say

Customers find these bowl covers better than Saran Wrap and easier to use than plastic wrap or tin foil. They are durable, lasting a year or more and keeping food fresh in the fridge, while being reusable and coming in three different sizes. Customers appreciate their functionality, with one mentioning they work well for sourdough baking, and find them convenient and good value for money.

  • Wendy Girl
    5.0 out of 5 stars Perfect cover for proofing bread!
    Reviewed in the United States on January 11, 2026
    Size: 50 Pack, 3 SizesVerified Purchase
    The covers came in 3 different sizes. I’ve only used 2 of them so far when making bread (covers bowl while dough is rising). So far they serve the purpose. Even the smallest one can stretch over an eight inch diameter bowl and seems to seal well. Not sure how durable or how many uses I’ll get out of one if used multiple times. Good value as there are many in the pack. I think they will be useful to cover food when having a picnic outside.
    Read more

  • Amazon Customer
    5.0 out of 5 stars Must have item for proofing dough
    Reviewed in the United States on October 14, 2025
    Size: 20 Pack, LargeVerified Purchase
    Product arrived well packaged and in a timely manner. Product is a great size for pretty much all my bowls as it just slips over the bowl and down the sides so can be used on more than one size bowl. Seems to be good quality, easily slips over the bowl. I can see getting many uses out of each one but even if it only lasts for one or two it is so much easier to use than fighting with plastic wrap.

  • Lisa F
    4.0 out of 5 stars As described, they do the job
    Reviewed in the United States on January 20, 2026
    Size: 20 Pack, LargeVerified Purchase
    Only reason for taking off a star is the way it was packaged. They came in a teeny tiny box and when I went to take them out, it was like a clown car. Other than that, the bowl covers seem fine. I use them on my kitchen aid mixer bowl to proof bread dough. I like that you can see through them as my other covers were black, so I had to lift an edge to check progress.
    Would recommend, just be prepared to store them in a different container

  • ElleMphs
    5.0 out of 5 stars Multiple sizes, versatile, functional...
    Reviewed in the United States on October 23, 2024
    Size: 100 Pack, 3 SizesVerified Purchase
    I am one of those people who has never been able to make cling wrap work, not once, ever. But I can handle these. Nice order, in 3 sizes with colored elastic so I have a fighting chance of finding the size I want. No weird smell. Elastic is working. I use these alot when I make bulk salads for the week, proofing dough, or for covering bins & bowls that I want to stay clean. They came neatly stacked in sets of 3 of each size, so I can keep most stored with just 1 full set in a drawer. They clean well by hand. I have a drying rack for silicone food storage bags that works really well to dry all types of small-ish bags. Some of these have been washed 4-5 times so far & are holding up well. Very convenient to have around because you never know when you might need one, or two...

About this Item

  • Reusable Plastic Wrap Alternative: Replace disposable plastic wrap cover with our reusable plastic bowl covers. These plastic food covers stretch reusable and plastic covers for bowls keep food fresh and reduce waste, essential for conscious kitchens
  • Multi-Purpose Use: Our elastic bowl covers reusable are perfect for bread proofing cover, sourdough bowl cover, and food covers for plates. These plastic covers for bowls with elastic and dish covers for food are must-have kitchen gadgets.
  • Outdoor Essential: Use our plastic food covers with elastic for picnics and outdoor meals. These dish covers for food, plastic food wrap, and disposable food cover plastic wrap keep bugs away, ensuring cleanliness for any outdoor dining setup.
  • Easy Cleanup: Simplify your cleanup with our reusable lids for bowls. These plastic lids for bowls, elastic food storage covers, and reusable saran wrap are great for covering leftovers, making storage easy, and maintaining freshness.
  • Ideal for Baking: Our bread bowl cover, bread proofing cover, and dough cover are perfect for bakers. These reusable fresh-keeping bags, stretchy bowl covers reusable, and plastic elastic bowl covers maintain dough consistency, essential for baking.
